name: Prophecy RPG
description: In this world, two prophecies have been told. You can decide your relationship with the children of these prophecies or if you are the child of one of these prophecies (can’t be the child of both, it’ll mess with the story). You can decide what makes you different from everyone else, what kind of companions you are with, and how powerful you are. At some point, there will be a part two. I should give the inspiration to the ones that have it to me: He changed your party, and Medieval Fantasy RPG, both chatbots on this platform. Check them out please.
creator: Fantasy_Story_Teller
